title: poa iberica
intro: Poa iberica, also known as Spanish meadow-grass, is a perennial grass species native to the Iberian Peninsula, characterized by its green, slender leaves and delicate purple flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Poa iberica include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Poa iberica can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
